name: Amla Juice
description: 100% pure cold-pressed organic Amla (Indian Gooseberry) juice. High in Vitamin C, boosts immunity, aids digestion, and promotes glowing skin and hair health.
ingredients: Organic Amla fruit pulp, Water, Honey

reviews.name: Aarav Mehta
reviews.comment: Absolutely pure and fresh! Best amla juice I've ever purchased online.

name: Amla Candy
description: Delicious, chewy sun-dried amla bites infused with natural honey and mild spices. A healthy alternative to sugary candies.
ingredients: Dried Amla shreds, Honey, Ginger powder, Cumin

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.comment: Perfect balance of sweet and sour. My kids love this healthy candy!

name: Amla Powder
description: Fine ground organic dried amlas. Perfect for adding to smoothies, teas, or hair masks for natural conditioning.

reviews.name: Rohan Das
reviews.comment: Very fine powder and smells authentic. Good product.

name: Dried Amla
description: Salted and spiced dry amla shreds. Great for chewing after meals as a natural digestive aid.
ingredients: Sun-dried wild Amla, Rock salt, Black pepper, Lemon juice

reviews.name: Vikram Singh
reviews.comment: Nice digestive taste, slightly salty. Good to keep in pocket.

name: Alphonso Mango Juice ( Aam Rass )
description: Premium, naturally-ripened Alphonso mangoes sourced directly from Devgad, India. Famous for their rich aroma, sweet fiberless pulp, and golden skin.
ingredients: Fresh naturally ripened Devgad Alphonso Mangoes

reviews.name: Ananya Sen
reviews.comment: The smell filled the entire room! Extremely sweet, rich, and juicy. True Devgad Hapus.

name: Mango Pulp
description: Freshly prepared, thick, sweet mango pulp made with real Alphonso mangoes. Free from artificial colors, flavors, or chemical preservatives.
ingredients: Alphonso Mango pulp (95%), Organic sugar syrup, Cardamom

reviews.name: Kabir Joshi
reviews.comment: Deliciously thick and natural! Tastes exactly like freshly pureed mangoes.

name: Mango Pickle
description: Authentic home-style raw mango pickle prepared with cold-pressed mustard oil and an aromatic blend of traditional Indian spices.
ingredients: Raw Mango slices, Cold-pressed mustard oil, Fennel seeds, Fenugreek, Turmeric, Red chili powder, Salt

reviews.name: Siddharth Rao
reviews.comment: Tastes like the pickle my grandmother makes. Very spicy and oil is high quality.

name: Dried Mango Slices
description: Perfectly sliced dried mangoes. Chewy, sweet, and tangy healthy snack to satisfy your mango cravings all year round.

reviews.name: Neha Gupta
reviews.comment: Great healthy snack for travel. Not too sweet, which I like.

name: Dry Fruit Modak
description: Premium healthy modaks crafted from dates, figs, almonds, cashews, and pistachios. No added sugar or artificial sweeteners.
ingredients: Dates, Dried Figs, Almonds, Cashews, Pistachios, Cardamom, Ghee

reviews.name: Meera Nair
reviews.comment: Highly recommended for festivals. Guilt-free sweet option and tastes premium.

name: Chocolate Modak
description: A modern twist on the classic sweet! Premium dark and milk chocolate modaks filled with a rich chocolate hazelnut ganache.
ingredients: Dark chocolate, Milk chocolate, Roasted Hazelnuts, Cocoa butter, Heavy cream

reviews.name: Dev Patel
reviews.comment: Innovative and delicious! The hazelnut filling is out of this world.

name: Ukadiche Modak
description: Traditional steamed rice-flour dumplings stuffed with fresh grated coconut and organic jaggery, scented with cardamom. Made fresh daily.
ingredients: Rice flour, Fresh grated coconut, Organic jaggery, Cardamom, Nutmeg, Pure Ghee

reviews.name: Aditya Kulkarni
reviews.comment: Tastes super authentic. Just warm it slightly before eating for best flavor.

name: Kesar Modak
description: Rich, melt-in-the-mouth mawa modaks infused with premium Kashmiri saffron (Kesar) and garnished with pure silver leaf (vark).
ingredients: Fresh Milk Mawa (Khoya), Kashmiri Saffron, Cardamom, Organic Sugar, Silver Leaf

reviews.name: Shreya Ghoshal
reviews.comment: Beautiful presentation with the silver foil, Saffron flavor is very strong.

name: Mixed Fruit Jam
description: Indulge in our Mixed Fruit Jam, a perfect blend of fresh apples, grapes, pineapples, papayas, and oranges. Sourced from high-altitude orchards, it has a rich fruity aroma and smooth texture.
ingredients: Mixed Fruit Pulp (Apple, Pineapple, Grape, Papaya, Orange), Organic Sugar, Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid

reviews.name: Amit Shah
reviews.comment: Very natural flavor, not overly sugary. Perfect on morning toast!

name: Strawberry Jam
description: Premium sweet jam prepared from fresh, sun-ripened organic strawberries. Bursting with chunks of real strawberries and rich berry flavour.
ingredients: Organic Strawberries, Sugar, Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid

reviews.name: Riya Sen
reviews.comment: Tastes like fresh strawberries. Outstanding texture and quality.

name: Mango Jam
description: Rich tropical jam made from fresh Devgad Alphonso mango pulp. Sweet, smooth, and full of pure mango essence.
ingredients: Alphonso Mango Pulp, Sugar, Pectin, Citric Acid

reviews.name: Dinesh Kartik
reviews.comment: Unique tropical jam. If you like Alphonso, you will love this.

name: Pineapple Jam
description: Tangy and sweet jam crafted from fresh juicy pineapples. Excellent spread for breads, biscuits, and pancakes.
ingredients: Juicy Pineapple Pulp, Sugar, Pectin, Citric Acid

reviews.name: Pooja Hegde
reviews.comment: Very nice sweet and sour tang. Perfect for baking as well.

name: Papaya Jam
ingredients: Orange Peel strips, Orange juice, Sugar, Fruit Pectin, Citric Acid

reviews.name: Karan Johar
reviews.comment: Excellent bitter-sweet balance. The peel strips are perfectly cut.

name: Mixed Berry Jam
description: Gourmet jam combining raspberries, blueberries, and blackberries. Deep color, rich forest berry aroma, and sweet-tart flavor.
ingredients: Forest Raspberries, Blueberries, Blackberries, Sugar, Pectin, Citric Acid
